patches.hypothesis: The problem was caused by the fact that the locale was not being properly set in the getDateInstance method. This was due to the fact that the locale was not being passed correctly to the getInstance method.

The problem was caused by the fact that the `FastDateFormat` class was not properly handling the default locale when creating a new instance. The test case was failing because the locale was being set to `en_US` instead of `de_DE`.
